title: aeluropus pubescens
intro: Aeluropus pubescens, also known as sea couch grass or saltwort, is a type of succulent plant that is native to coastal areas and salt marshes. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, gout, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Aeluropus pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Aeluropus pubescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
